creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Hello, Marcus.

(In reply to Marcus von Appen from comment #5)
> Did you have a talk with games@FreeBSD.org about that port and are they
> willing to adopt it?

I didn't talk about it with games@FreeBSD.org. I just chose appropriate address, based on other maintainer behaviour (on the svn logs), in case they drop maintainership. May be, ports@FreeBSD.org will be right decision otherwise. I just share useful/interesting port with the community. I think, people have the same rights to propose patches for new version, if needed.
